description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ffsubsync that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job strategy to test on macOS, Ubuntu, and Windows with Python 3.7.x, 3.8.x, 3.9.x, and 3.10.x. For each job, check out the repository, optionally check out submodules, set up Python, install dependencies, lint with flake8, and run unit and integration tests with pytest, uploading coverage reports to Codecov on Ubuntu.
